response: DataFlow AI, a data infrastructure startup founded in 2022, has emerged as a fast-growing young company, building its team to 18 people while generating $120,000 in monthly recurring revenue (MRR) and sustaining a 25% month-over-month (MoM) growth rate that caught the eye of leading investors Sequoia and YC. The startup recently closed its Series A funding round, raising $8.5 million in capital that pushes its current valuation to $42 million, marking a strong early milestone for the young firm that has scaled rapidly in its first two years of operation.
